basis.founded: 2014 (TraderSync). Cypher AI launch date not publicly stated; actively marketed in 2025-2026 [uncertain].
basis.target_market: Active retail traders across stocks, options, futures, forex, crypto. Global, professional-leaning. Used by thousands of traders worldwide.
basis.pricing_model: Subscription only (no free tier). Pro $29.95/mo, Premium $49.95/mo, Elite $79.95/mo. Annual billing ~45% off. 7-day free trial on all plans, no CC.

ai_features.ai_scope: Per-trade (every trade monitored for plan-adherence), per-period (pattern detection across history, alerts when underperformance starts), per-playbook (plan-adherence analysis per strategy).
ai_features.ai_proactive_vs_reactive: Hybrid (strongly proactive). Push: 'Cypher AI detects patterns across your trade history without you asking' and 'sends alerts when underperformance begins'. Pull: conversational Q&A about performance.
ai_features.ai_minimum_trade_threshold: Not disclosed; conversational quality scales with data [uncertain]
ai_features.ai_underlying_tech: Not publicly disclosed (OpenAI vs Claude not named). Marketed as 'AI assistant' with conversational + pattern-detection capabilities. [uncertain]
ai_features.output_format: Conversational chat, push alerts, accountability reports (text-based), plan-adherence stats dashboards.
ai_features.notable_prompts: Marketed example output: 'Cypher can identify patterns like traders holding non-adherent trades 20 minutes longer than trades that follow the plan' (i.e. quantifies financial impact of rule breaks). Conversational Q&A about performance. Detects emerging trends and plan deviations. Specific prompt templates not publicly published [uncertain].

playbook_depth.playbook_concept_maturity: rule-adherence-scored. TraderSync lets users design a strategy checklist + comprehensive trading plan with rules (max loss per day, max trades per session, market sentiment, drawdown limits) and tracks adherence with reports. Cypher AI quantifies the financial impact of rule breaks.
playbook_depth.setup_level_ai: Yes — Cypher monitors plan-adherence per strategy and flags when a specific strategy's adherence drops. The AI works across the user's defined plan rules and reports which setups deviated. Not advertised as auto-generating new setup-level insights without a defined playbook, but it does setup-level reasoning on top of the user's playbook.
playbook_depth.rule_adherence_scoring: Yes, explicit. 'Rule tracking lets you measure adherence to your plan with greater precision' and 'if you break your rules, TraderSync spots it and tallies up the financial impact.' Accountability reports include plan-adherence stats.
playbook_depth.pre_trade_validation: Not advertised as a pre-entry AI pressure-test. Adherence is measured post-trade against pre-defined rules; user is alerted afterward. [uncertain]
playbook_depth.playbook_template_library: Strategy checklist builder is core; pre-built named-setup templates (FVG, VWAP) not advertised as shipping out of the box [uncertain].

privacy_stack.cost_per_month_user: $29.95-$79.95/mo. AI included in plan; no separate API charge.

crypto_fit.crypto_perp_exchange_support: Crypto coverage marketed broadly: 'import crypto trades from exchanges or wallets'. Named: Binance, Coinbase, Hyperliquid (TraderSync has a dedicated Hyperliquid landing page). 100+ broker auto-sync, 700+ broker support overall. Blofin/MEXC not explicitly confirmed [uncertain].
crypto_fit.multi_asset: Stocks, options, futures, futures options, forex, crypto.
crypto_fit.partial_close_awareness: Likely handled at execution-level import (TraderSync has been around since 2014 with mature broker imports), but no explicit multi-TP first-class concept advertised [uncertain].
crypto_fit.funding_rate_context: Not advertised as fed into AI analysis [uncertain].
crypto_fit.gap_session_breakdown_per_setup: Cypher can do conversational setup × session queries on demand; automated 'per-playbook × session' breakdown report not explicitly named as a killer feature [uncertain].

coaching_depth.coaching_depth_level: deep_pattern_analysis. Cypher quantifies behavioral patterns ('holding non-adherent trades 20 minutes longer'), tallies financial impact of rule breaks, sends proactive underperformance alerts, monitors discipline — well beyond surface metrics.
coaching_depth.psychology_metrics: Discipline / plan-adherence focus; specific named tags (Tiltmeter, FOMO, revenge) not the headline framing. Behavioral pattern detection across trade history is the core psychology angle. [uncertain]
coaching_depth.mentor_mode: Not advertised as mentor-mode (no marketed 'share journal with coach' workflow) [uncertain].

community.community_driven_ai: Not advertised as a shared-AI-template or community-driven feature [uncertain].
community.changelog_ai_velocity: Cypher AI was a major addition in the 2024-2025 product evolution; specific dated release schedule for AI features available on tradersync.com/software-updates [uncertain on exact dates].
